ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the course */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subcategory of the course */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the teacher who created the course */,
  "enrolled_students" INTEGER /* Number of students currently enrolled in the course */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the course */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the course */,
  "level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the course (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the course */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Relevant keywords or tags for the course */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the course (e.g., Active, Inactive, Draft) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the course was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the course was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("subcategory_id") REFERENCES subcategories ("subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the subcategory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teachers" (
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teacher */,
  "teacher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the teacher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the teacher */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the teacher */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the teacher (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the teacher's last login */,
  "login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of login attempts by the teacher */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the teacher's account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the teacher's account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the student (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the student's last login */,
  "login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of login attempts by the student */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the student's account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the student's account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student who enrolled */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course the student enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., active, inactive, pending) */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the student completed the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the enrollment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the enrollment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lessons" (
  "lesson_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lesson */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course the lesson belongs to */,
  "lesson_title" TEXT /* Title of the lesson */,
  "lesson_order" INTEGER /* Order of the lesson within the course */,
  "lesson_content" TEXT /* Content of the lesson */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the lesson video */,
  "material_url" TEXT /* URL of the lesson materials */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the lesson */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the lesson (e.g., active, draft) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the lesson was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the lesson was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lesson_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lessons_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lesson_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "lesson_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the lesson the comment is made on */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lesson_comments_lesson_id FOREIGN KEY ("lesson_id") REFERENCES lessons ("lesson_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lesson_comments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course the review is made on */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student who made the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the student (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_reviews_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_reviews_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_certificates" (
  "certificate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certificate */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student who received the certificate */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course the certificate is for */,
  "certificate_name" TEXT /* Name of the certificate */,
  "certificate_description" TEXT /* Description of the certificate */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date when the certificate was issued */,
  "certificate_url" TEXT /* URL of the certificate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certificate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_certificates_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_certificates_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each requirement */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course the requirement is for */,
  "requirement_type" TEXT /* Type of the requirement (e.g., prerequisite course, skill level) */,
  "requirement_value" TEXT /* Value of the requirement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_requirements_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_ratings" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the course */,
  "average_rating" TEXT /* Average rating of the course (1-5) */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_enrollment_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical entry */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the historical entry */,
  "enrollment_count" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled on that date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollment_history_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price change */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the course */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the price becomes effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the price expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_prices_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course */,
  "promotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "promotion_description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "promotion_code" TEXT /* Promotion code */,
  "discount_percentage" TEXT /* Discount percentage */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_promotions_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_waitlists" (
  "waitlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waitlist entry */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student on the waitlist */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the student joined the waitlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("waitlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_waitlists_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_waitlists_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_gateways" (
  "gateway_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment gateway */,
  "gateway_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment gateway */,
  "gateway_description" TEXT /* Description of the payment gateway */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gateway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student who made the transaction */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course the transaction is for */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "gateway_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the payment gateway used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_gateway_id FOREIGN KEY ("gateway_id") REFERENCES payment_gateways ("gateway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student who received the recommendation */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course recommended */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_recommendations_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_recommendations_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)
